code:
import io
import string
import list

fn read_ints() -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    let t = match toks.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  nums
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < list.len(sorted)
    let v = match list.get(sorted, i)
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let a = read_ints()
let b = read_ints()

mut unique: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(a)
  let v = match list.get(a, i)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  if not list.contains(unique, v)
    unique = list.push(unique, v)
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut j = 0
while j < list.len(b)
  let v = match list.get(b, j)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  if not list.contains(unique, v)
    unique = list.push(unique, v)
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut k = 0
while k < list.len(unique)
  let v = match list.get(unique, k)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
  k = k + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut m = 0
while m < list.len(sorted)
  let v = match list.get(sorted, m)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  if m == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  m = m + 1
end
println(out)
